nodes.name: 歐亞大陸
nodes.summary: 歐亞大陸是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、角鸊鷉、北方中杜鹃等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 大洋洲
nodes.summary: 大洋洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括银肩果鸠、弯嘴滨鹬、美洲尖尾濱鷸等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 毛里塔尼亚

nodes.name: 加蓬
nodes.summary: 加蓬是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Scaly spurfowl、Red-necked spurfowl等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

nodes.name: 弯嘴滨鹬
nodes.summary: 弯嘴滨鹬（Curlew sandpiper，学名 Calidris ferruginea），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鹬科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 肯尼亚
nodes.summary: 肯尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联51种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl等51种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹬科
nodes.summary: 鹬科（Scolopacidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联71种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、Upland sandpiper、小杓鹬等71种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: After the breeding season, it migrates south to spend the winter in Africa and along the coasts of Oceania and southern Eurasia, occupying tidal mudflats and saltpans

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: After the breeding season, it migrates south to spend the winter in Africa and along the coasts of Oceania and southern Eurasia, occupying tidal mudflats and saltpans

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds exclusively in the Siberian extreme high Arctic tundra from the Yamal Peninsula to the Kolyuchin Bay. It breeds in coastal lowlands and offshore islands, where the severe climate with harsh cold winds and short growing period prevents the growth of shrubs, and melting snow overlying the permafrost creates boggy conditions. The nest is typically placed on the margins of wet hollows or pools, or on the gentle slopes of hummocks, often close to the nests of Pluvialis plovers like grey plover or Pacific golden plover. Its non-breeding range includes coastal regions of west Africa (from Mauritania to Gabon and including Cape Verde) and southern Africa (inland throughout Mozambique to Namibia to South Africa, and north through Uganda to Kenya)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: An estimated 200,000 winter in South Asia; however this figure may be an overestimate. The East Asian–Australasian Flyway population is estimated at 120,000. The curlew sandpiper has experienced habitat loss throughout its wintering and migratory ranges. On the coast of the Yellow Sea, 65% of intertidal habitats in the Yellow Sea have been lost over the past 50 years, and the amount of reclaimed land exceeds the extent of the remaining intertidal mudflats, which may have been a major cause in the population decline
